text:
955



Korean netizens are expressing outrage afterSouth Koreawas mistakenly referred to as the "Democratic People's Republic of Korea" during the opening ceremony of the 2024 Paris Olympics.The error occurred when the French and English narrators introduced South Korea as 'The Democratic People's Republic of Korea,' which is North Korea, instead of The Republic of Korea.



Many Korean online users were baffled by the mistake and took to social media and various online communities to express their anger and outrage. Many expressed disbelief and shared, "Guys, did I hear this wrong? Did they introduce our country as 'Democratic People's Republic of Korea' when we were entering????"



Korean netizenscommented:



"This is the worst."



"Is North Korea even participating in the Olympics?"



"I thought I heard wrong for a second."



"They must be crazy."



"How did they make that mistake?"



"That is so uncivilized."



"Very uneducated."



"How incredibly uncivilized. This is so typical of France."



"France? Really?"



"That was racist."



"Racism at the Olympics, really? Do they even understand the purpose of the Olympics? So uncivilized..."



"They should apologize."



"What is going on?"

title: K-netizens outraged after South Korea was called North Korea during the 2024 Paris Olympics opening ceremony | allkpop
description: Korean netizens are expressing outrage after South Korea was mistakenly referred to as the "Democratic People's Republic of Korea"…
